Container.Name: WishingBot
Container.Overview:
WhatsApp Wishing Bot — automatically sends birthday and anniversary wishes via WhatsApp. Includes a web UI for managing contacts, occasions, and AI settings.
⚠️ This image must be built locally. SSH into Unraid and run: cd /mnt/user/appdata/wishing-bot git pull docker build -t wishing-bot:latest -f Dockerfile.single .
Then start the container from this template.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database and bot data

Config.Name: WhatsApp Session
Config.Description: WhatsApp Web session files (keeps you logged in across restarts)

Config.Name: NAS IP
Config.Description: Your Unraid server IP address — used to build the web UI URL shown in the app

Config.Name: AI Provider
Config.Description: Which AI backend to use: auto (local first, then Claude), claude, openai, gemini, or local

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: API key for Claude (Anthropic). Get one at https://console.anthropic.com

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: API key for OpenAI (ChatGPT). Get one at https://platform.openai.com

Config.Name: OpenAI Model
Config.Description: OpenAI model to use, e.g. gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4o, gpt-4-turbo

Config.Name: Gemini API Key
Config.Description: API key for Google Gemini. Get one at https://aistudio.google.com

Config.Name: Gemini Model
Config.Description: Gemini model to use, e.g. gemini-2.0-flash, gemini-1.5-pro

Config.Name: Local AI URL
Config.Description: Base URL for a local OpenAI-compatible API server (e.g. LM Studio or Ollama). Use the Tailscale IP if on a different subnet.

Config.Name: Local AI Model
Config.Description: Model name to request from the local AI server. Leave blank to auto-detect the first available model.

Config.Name: Scheduler Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for the daily wish scheduler. Use IANA format, e.g. America/New_York, Europe/London, Asia/Kolkata

Config.Name: Scheduler Hour
Config.Description: Hour of day (0-23) to send wishes (in the timezone above)

Config.Name: Scheduler Minute
Config.Description: Minute (0-59) of the hour to send wishes
